rulings.Case Title: TIEA DUBLIN VS. EDUARDO NAGUIT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendnats Eduagro Naguit, Naguit Family Trust And Milagros Naguit'S Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 1. Defendants Eduagro Naguit, Naguit Family Trust And Milagros Naguit's Motion To Strike Grant motion to strike without leave to amend. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIEA DUBLIN VS. EDUARDO NAGUIT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendnats Eduagro Naguit, Naguit Family Trust And Milagros Naguit'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 1. Defendants Eduagro Naguit, Naguit Family Trust And Milagros Naguit's Demurrer To Complaint Sustained without leave to amend the Stipulation (including releasing defendant from tenancy claim); was found valid by the Appellate Division. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Motion To Expunge Notices Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Motion To Expunge Notices Of Pendency Of Action Hearing required to address allegations in amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDRE PATTERSON VS. CHARLES BYRD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Declare Pltf A Vaxatious Litigant For A Prefiling Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CHARLES BYRD'S Notice Of Motion To Declare Pltf A Vaxatious Litigant For A Prefiling Order Grant - no opposition filed and CCP 391.1 and 391.7 met. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Leave To Intervene As A Party Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 4. INTERVENOR U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Leave To Intervene As A Party Defendant Grant Intervention. Moving party showed interest in the property and no adequate respresentation by existing parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised in the demurrer. No proof of service re opposition on moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. DARRYL GREER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Grant - no opposition filed. Court finds defendant Greer breached stipulation, no rental payment since November 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRICK, PATRICIA, SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARTHA VS. MARJORIE MANZELLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT MARJORIE MANZELLA AND ANTHONY MANZELLA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to address issues raised in the demurrer. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6c in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA VILLANUEVA VS. ALICIA SALVADOR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT ALICIA SALVADOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled - Complaint sufficiently alleges CCP 1161a. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2238 HYDE, LLC VS. CURT DETWELLER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT CURT DETWELLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled - Moving party fails to cite any authority that Lo Sornio is not controlling. Sheppard, Uziel, Sussman & Rosen is ordered again to comply with San Francisco Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C (See CUD-12-643746). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER VS. STEPHEN COFFEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 9. PLAINTIFF MANFRED ANGSTENBERGER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Denied - Triable issue material fact re creation of tenancy (see defendant's declaration Paragraph 7 and 8 and Exhibit 2 and 3.). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. GLORIA L LOMELI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 28, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT ALBERTO DELRIO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled - Complaint sufficiently alleges CCP 1161a. = (501/REQ)
